{{Quote|Once again this is Nikki Vul on Coruscant. Almost as suddenly as it began, the CIS attack on the galactic capital has come to an end, with the Confederacy fleet making a hasty retreat.|Nikki Vul|<ref name="Reversal of Fortune">''[[Reversal of Fortune]]''</ref>}}
'''Nikki Vul''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] news reporter near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Vul reported on the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] in a HoloNet item broadcast across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], in which she revealed the outcome of the battle and praised its heroes, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] learned of developments on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] through Vul's report.

==Appearances==
*''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{Hologram}}
